DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONERS FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED WITH THE EXCEPTION THAT CLAIMANTS NEED NOT PRODUCE THEIR TAX RETURNS. THE DA'S OFFICE IS TO SERVE NOTICE OF THIS RULING ON CLAIMANTS. RESPONSES TO BE SERVED BY 9/1/16. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO-TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-18-2016 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR ORDER FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING CLAIM; POINTS AND AUTHORITIES; DECLARATION OF RAYMOND FONG AND CHLOE MOSQUEDA IN SUPPORT THEREOF IS GRANTED. THE CLAIM OF CLAIMANT IS STRUCK. PETITIONER MAY WITHDRAW THE PETITION FOR FORFEITURE AND PROCEED WITH NON-JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS. NO OPPOSITION FILED. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID R. MCDONALD; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (D302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Raymond Fong And Chloe Mosqueda In Support Thereof [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Nov-18-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Assistant District Attorney, Rebecca D. Wagner of the Office of the San Francisco District Attorney (415-553-4997) appears as counsel for the Petitioner/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Raymond Fong And Chloe Mosqueda In Support Thereof is granted. The claim of claimant is struck. Petitioner may withdraw the Petition for forfeiture and proceed with non-judicial forfeiture proceedings. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Judge Pro Tem: David R. McDonald; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim; Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Raymond Fong And Chloe Mosqueda In Support Thereof [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Continued To Nov-18-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Aug-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RAYMOND FONG, DEPUTY DISTRICT ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-845-5807 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioners First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioners First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories is Granted with the exception that claimants need not produce their tax returns. The DA's office is to serve notice of this ruling on claimants. Responses to be served by 9/1/16. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro-Tem: David Mcdonald; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.
